name: Chili Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 Bell peppers (red, green, yellow), cut into strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large non-stick skillet over medium heat.
2. Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
3. Add bell peppers, sliced onions, cumin, oregano, and chili flakes.
4. Mix well and cover the pan.
5. Cook on medium heat for 10 minutes.
6. Slice chicken into half-inch strips and sprinkle with lemon juice.
7. Add vegetables to the skillet; stir gently.
8. Continue cooking on medium heat for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Season with salt and pepper.
10. Garnish with chopped parsley.
11. Serve with Hash Browns Potatoes.
Food Exchange per serving: 3 LOW/FAT MEAT ECHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE
Calories: 174
Protein: 60mg
Carbohydrates: 6g
Fiber: 168mg
Fat: 6g
